title: Deduplication fails together with dontTouch(io) in example from Chisel
body:
@seldridge @jackkoenig  Will fill out with example.... Hmm... I can't share the code where this happens and it turned out trickier than I thought to reproduce it.

What I have is a case where only the name of the module differs, i.e. it should have been deduplicated.

This breaks my OpenROAD scripts where I create a single deduplicated repeated macro.

Any chance of setting up an interactive debug session so as to figure out how to create a test-case?

Basically the problem is with a repeated macro where not all instances of the macro use all inputs or all the outputs are used.
